author: onlyworlds
description: World building toolset with OnlyWorlds integration.

manifest.author: Titus
manifest.description: Build and sync OnlyWorlds worlds from Obsidian.
manifest.name: OnlyWorlds Builder

name: OnlyWorlds Builder

releases.author: tmoosting
releases.description:
### OnlyWorlds v2 API under the hood

Every sync path now speaks the OnlyWorlds v2 API. No note-format changes -- your vault works exactly as before, but sync is faster, safer, and more honest.

- **Download World is incremental.** First download pulls everything; re-downloads pull only what changed (v2 change feed). Big worlds re-download in seconds.
- **Upload World no longer full-replaces.** Elements are created or updated individually -- elements that exist on the server but not in your vault are reported, **never deleted**.
- **New: Delete Element.** Permanently removes the active note's element from onlyworlds.com and trashes the note -- with a type-the-name confirmation.
- **Link safety.** A link field containing an unresolvable link is skipped (server values kept, with a notice) instead of pushing a reduced list. Element names with characters like ':' no longer break note files on Windows.
- **Progress feedback.** Downloading/uploading toasts with progress ticks.
- **Clearer errors** with the server's actual message and a link to the error docs.

Legacy endpoints fully retired; auth rides API-Key/API-Pin headers everywhere. Existing vaults work unchanged.
releases.name: 2.3.0 - OnlyWorlds v2 API + Delete Element

releases.author: tmoosting
releases.description:
Fixes HTML-entity escaping of element names (apostrophes, ampersands, quotes).

- Names like "The Kid's Family" were written into notes HTML-escaped (The Kid's Family), breaking [[link]] file lookups and storing escaped names via the API.
- Root fix: note templates no longer HTML-escape values; existing escaped notes are decoded on read, so old vaults self-repair on their next save/upload.

No settings or format changes.

releases.author: tmoosting
releases.description: Fixes a wrong-world write bug (edits could land in a different world when a stale key was set in plugin settings) and a rename that reported success without actually updating onlyworlds.com. Renames now sync only when the world has a write key, and say so clearly when they do not. Builds on 2.2.0: Download World, round-trip download-edit-upload, and both classic and ow_ key formats everywhere.

releases.author: tmoosting
releases.description: Download World returns (works with ow_ keys and classic keys), Save Element creates new elements, Upload World (renamed from Export) shows real error messages, Rename World syncs to onlyworlds.com, and map/pin/marker notes now download correctly. Full round trip download-edit-upload verified against the new platform.

releases.author: tmoosting
releases.description:
Retires the legacy Import World command, whose modal only accepted 10-digit numeric API keys. OnlyWorlds is moving to prefixed keys (ow_...) for newly minted keys — existing 10-digit keys keep working everywhere. World import/sync lives in the plugin settings (link world + sync), which accepts both key formats.

No other changes.

releases.author: tmoosting
releases.description:
## 2.0.1
Mobile support.

- `isDesktopOnly: false`
- Save Element, Create Element, and auto-sync already worked on mobile; now the rest of the commands do too.

releases.author: tmoosting
releases.description: OnlyWorlds Builder 2.0: rebuilt on the OnlyWorlds SDK with auto-sync, native settings, and PIN handling. See README for details.

releases.author: tmoosting
releases.description:
This update aligns the obsidian plugin with the OnlyWorlds 00.30.00 schema changes and new website and API infrastructure.

- Uses new PIN & World Key auth system for web operations
- New command: Save Element: saves the currently opened note individually
- Allow duplicate names for worlds and elements
- Add numeral indicators to element olders
- Various modal and styling improvements
- Integrate styles that were previously missing


NOTE: 
- This update includes significant schema changes. Back up your files to be safe.
- This plugin requires a free account at https://onlywords.com to unlock full functionality
releases.name: OnlyWorlds schema & website refactor

releases.author: tmoosting
releases.description:
- Fixed bundled files bug: README, Template and Handlebar files are now imported directly from GitHub
- Added new setting: default new element category

releases.author: tmoosting
releases.description: Release for an Obsidian plugin that supports world building and organization, and integration with a particular world building framework (OnlyWorlds)
releases.name: Obsidian OnlyWorlds Builder Release
